reviews.title: Tổng kết chung là tệ!
reviews.text:
Bọn mình ở 1 đêm.
Ưu điểm: vị trí gần ga cho những ai đi tàu. Nước tắm mạnh, thích. 
Nhược điểm: thẻ từ lỗi ko vào đc phòng, đổi thẻ khác vẫn ko vào đc phòng. Nvien ko check thẻ cho khách mà bảo khách lên thử xem đc ko rồi có gì báo lại sau. Xong vẫn ko vào đc lại gọi hỗ trợ. 
Có kiến ba khoang trong phòng như hình.
Giấy vệ sinh siêu lởm dù phòng 760k giá ko hề rẻ. Điều hoà kêu như lò vi sóng, lúc nóng lúc lạnh thất thường. 
Ko bao giờ quay lại.
reviews.response:
“Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm và đồng thời rất tiếc khi kỳ nghỉ của Quý khách chưa được như mong đợi.
Trước hết, chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi về các bất tiện Quý khách đã gặp phải như sự cố thẻ từ, việc hỗ trợ chưa kịp thời từ nhân viên, cũng như tình trạng vệ sinh phòng và trang thiết bị (điều hòa, vật dụng trong phòng). Đây hoàn toàn không phải là tiêu chuẩn dịch vụ mà khách sạn hướng tới.
Ngay sau khi nhận được phản hồi, chúng tôi đã làm việc với các bộ phận liên quan để kiểm tra lại hệ thống khóa thẻ, quy trình phục vụ của nhân viên lễ tân, cũng như rà soát công tác vệ sinh và bảo trì phòng nhằm đảm bảo không xảy ra tình trạng tương tự.
Chúng tôi rất mong có cơ hội được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại trong tương lai gần để mang đến trải nghiệm tốt hơn và trọn vẹn hơn.
Trân trọng cảm ơn và kính chúc Quý khách sức khỏe!”

Nguyễn Thị Hiền 
Giám đốc khách sạn

reviews.title: Really disappointed
reviews.text:
I paid extra to be in the VIP room (most expensive room of the hotel) and it got me really unhappy about it. the price i paid for its apparently very high for Vinh city and the room i got was indeed downgraded comparing to those hotel i have stayed so far. 

The bathroom is very stink, i had to spray the room with my perfume in order to use it. The bathtub it self does not have the shower holder, therefore when you shower, you have to actively hold the shower head to use it. The bathroom seems to have a broken hot tub, the button doesnt work to turn it on. Most annoyingly, the water runs super slow, it took me twice as time to finish my shower or the wash my face. 

Decoration of the room: It looks like it has not been maintained for quite sometimes. the wallspaper is ripped off in some part of the walls. The piece of wood underneath the TV is completely broken. and the TV is a very old one, it has none new chanels like youtube or netflix, etc. therefore, I barely use the TV. The sleeping lamps are also broken, i usually sleep with the light on and this seems to be a very annoying experience.

Staff service: I called the staff for more tissue supply, but they never came. however, when i leave the hotel, they did help me with my luggages, I also tipped them money to show my gratitudes. 

Overall, I did not mind about the staff service, because its just about tissues, however, everything together made it a very bad experience in the hotel, which I did not deserve to pay that much for VIP room.

reviews.title: Komfortables Hotel, ideal um eine lange Bahnfahrt zu unterbrechen.
reviews.positives:
Sehr schöne und komfortable Zimmer. Alles war sehr sauber und gepflegt. Für den Preis war das Zimmer wirklich erstklassig ausgestattet. Auch das Frühstück war super, sehr reichhaltiges Buffet. Auch die Leute an der Rezeption waren super freundlich. 
Ich hatte das Hotel ausgewählt, weil es nur 2 Minuten Fußweg vom Bahnhof in Vinh ist. Ich konnte so meine Fahrt von Hue nach Hanoi unterbrechen. Ankunft um 22 Uhr, Weiterfahrt um 11 Uhr, absolut zu empfehlen. Warum die Bewertungen teilweise so schlecht sind, kann ich überhaupt nicht verstehen. Das Hotel ist meiner Meinung nach makellos.

reviews.title: Could do better
reviews.text:
The staff were very pleasant people and they really tried, but....
It takes more to qualify for four stars, one should not advertise facilities and services then fail to provide them, from the lack of advertised "English speaking personnel, to the none existant bathrobes  "in every room"  the absence of "alternative meals" 
Do not invite guests to fill in a written special requests form (in this case regarding food allergy) and then ignore it. Admit it, when you cannot understand or have not been trained to deal with a situation. 
And, perhaps worst of all, the continuing fiasco of their leaking bathrooms! 
Reported by previous guests some time ago, the hotel failed to make repairs. 
I too, reported that the bath plug hole leaked onto the floor so fast that the tap could not fill the bath and the hot water ran out trying! 
The shower did the same, together with running down the walls directly onto the floor. It would have been better to simply remove the useless bathtub!
A man came to  "fix it" interruoting supper (which was barely warm when it reached me) and the following morning, it was even worse. 
I left two hours late, without a shower, after spending an hour trying to explain the concept of "European" breakfast, but without gluten. 
I expect ignorance of food allergies and am more tban ready to patiently explain but why ask the question, in writing, the day before and fail to read the answer???
"The biggest hotel chain in Indochina" was the proud boast in the looping elavator video. With claims like this, their is no excuse. As a former hotel director, I do not expect four star service at a two star hotel but, I do expect four star service at a four star hotel. 
The staff seem genuinely helpful and attentive; they deserve to be better equipped by management, to fulfill the company's advertised standards
reviews.response:
Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We truly appreciate your kind words about our staff’s attitude and efforts, and we sincerely apologize that your overall experience did not meet the expectations of a four-star property.
We regret the shortcomings you mentioned, including the lack of English-speaking personnel as advertised, missing bathrobes, unavailable alternative meals, and especially the failure to properly address your written food allergy request. This is not the level of service we aim to provide. We are also very concerned about the bathroom leakage issue and are prioritizing corrective maintenance.
Your comments have been shared with management for immediate review, staff retraining, and service improvements. We genuinely hope to have another opportunity to restore your confidence in us.
General Manager
Nguyen Thi Hien

reviews.positives: It had a pool. Room was spacious but junior suite had carpet that was stained and icky. Location to train station was good. Breakfast was fine.
reviews.negatives: Staff seemed to be bothered by being asked anything throughout our stay (didn’t even have a travel agent to recommend), room servicing was hit and miss each day, had to track someone down and ask for towels after not getting serviced for days in a row and carpet floors weren’t cleaned in the six nights we were there, made worse by it being 10 years past it’s used by date. Spa leaked water constantly (only using it for showers) so water was constantly running across the floor, trodden everywhere and never got dry. Wouldn’t allow us to check out until they had audited our room and almost missed our bus because they couldn’t find a teaspoon. 15 mins later we worked out what the issue was and offered to pay for it (they’ll find it later)… held up over a 3000 dong / 20 cent spoon. Karaoke from the restaurant carries through the entire hotel from lunch time to evening.

reviews.title: Good hotel with affordable prices, friendly staff.
reviews.text: The hotel is located in the city center, affordable, has good service, and friendly staff. The only downside for Vinh City is the restriction on 16-seat vehicles on too many streets; it's a small city with 54 restricted streets, which is very inconvenient for groups traveling in vehicles of 16 seats or more. Our group, returning from a temple visit, couldn't find any road that allowed 16-seat vehicles and had to call Mường Thanh Vinh Hotel for assistance. The hotel promptly sent someone to guide us safely to our destination.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: I arrived to check in very late, around 4:30 PM, but when I contacted the hotel, they could not find my booking code. I had to wait quite a long time, about 20-30 minutes, for the hotel to check, and I had to call Agoda myself. It was also complicated to find the customer service number for Agoda, and when I finally got through, I discovered that Agoda sold the room to My Tour. I had placed the booking and paid 7 days earlier, but Agoda did not send a confirmation email to the hotel. It was sunny, and the hotel lobby had no air conditioning, so I struggled for a long time before receiving the room. When I got to the room, it was a bit old but clean. The air conditioning was weak. In general, the hotel should improve a little since it is quite old, and as for Agoda, I cannot accept their way of working.
reviews.response:

Personally, I find the breakfast here to be tastier and better than some other 4-star Muong Thanh hotels I have stayed at (Lao Cai, Thanh Hoa). 
Cons: The parking space is a bit cramped. The bathtub in my room had a leak, causing the floor to get wet, which was a bit inconvenient.

reviews.title: Communication and disturbances
reviews.text:
I arrived in the evening and asked the lady reception to book me a taxi for 5.30am to the bus station. In the morning the young man on duty had no idea about this or the fact I was checking out early so I guess there's a communication problem, worsened by the fact he didn't speak any English. 
About 11pm someone rang on my room's doorbell while I was sleeping. I ignored it only to find about 11.30 pm it was rung persistently thereby ruining my sleep. I had to answer the door to a "sorry" from a young man, either a guest or staff. Obviously the information that my room was occupied had not reached this man.

The high floor has a nice view. The staff is polite. Chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi thấy quý khách đã chia sẻ những trải nghiệm tốt tại khách sạn và vị trí của chúng tôi đã đáp ứng được mong đợi của quý khách.
Mường Thanh tự hào là chuỗi khách sạn thuần Việt lớn nhất Đông Dương, vì vậy chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi thấy quý khách đã có một kì nghỉ vui vẻ tại khách sạn. Đây cũng là niềm tin và động lực cho nhân viên khách sạn trên hành trình nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ khách hàng.
Một lần nữa, chúng tôi cám ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian quý báu để phản hồi về trải nghiệm tại khách sạn.
Rất mong được đón tiếp quý khách tại khách sạn Mường Thanh Vinh trong thời gian tới.
Xin chân thành cảm ơn!
Giám đốc điều hành
Nguyễn Thị Bảo Trúc

reviews.response:

General Manager
Nguyen Thi Hien

Kính chào chị Võ Hương!
Trước hết cho phép tôi thay mặt khách sạn Mường Thanh Vinh xin gửi lời cảm ơn chân thành sâu sắc đến chị đã sử dụng dịch vụ tại khách sạn và để lại lời đánh giá quý báu.
Chúng tôi rất vui khi chị đã có trải nghiệm tuyệt vời trong thời gian lưu trú tại khách sạn.
Chúng tôi luôn nỗ lực không ngừng để mang đến dịch vụ tốt nhất tới quý khách hàng. Luôn luôn nâng cấp dịch vụ về cơ sở vật chất cũng như trau dồi kỹ năng cho nhân viên.
Một lần nữa xin được cảm ơn ý kiến đánh giá của chị, rất mong sẽ sớm được đón tiếp chị và gia đình trong thời gian tới.
Xin chân thành cảm ơn!
Trân trọng!
Giám đốc điều hành
Dương Thị Linh
